title: Chain of Fools
why_this_song: Chain of Fools by Aretha Franklin (1967) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 77 times; first heard in: "Chain, chain, chain"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Chain of fools"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I'm just a link in your chain"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "You treated me mean"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Has got a weak link"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "chain" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "chain" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fools" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "fools" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Chain of Fools" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Chain of Fools" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Chain of Fools" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Chain of Fools"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Aretha Franklin one question about "Chain of Fools", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Aretha Franklin sobre "Chain of Fools", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
